## 📝 Description
Please describe the assets you are contributing:  
- What type of asset is it? (texture, model, sound, etc.)  
- What feature, block, item, or entity does it relate to?  
- Which files or folders are affected?

## 🔄 Related Issues
List any related issues this PR closes or references:  
- Closes #
- References #

## 🎨 Asset Details
- Resolution / format (e.g., 16x16 PNG, .ogg sound)  
- Folder structure: where should the asset be placed in the project?  
- Style notes: how does it match UBM's visual/audio style?  

## 🛠️ Testing / Preview
- How did you test or preview the asset in-game?  
- Screenshots, videos, or sound previews (optional but recommended)  

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] Asset is **original** and does not use Minecraft default assets  
- [ ] Asset follows UBM style guidelines  
- [ ] Folder structure is correct and matches `/src/main/resources/assets/ubm/...`  
- [ ] PR title follows `[Asset]: <short description>` format  
- [ ] Optional: linked to related issue  

✨ *Thank you for contributing assets! Your work helps make UBM feel modern while preserving 1.12.2 compatibility.* ✨
